name: Periodic Properties & Variations
description: Periodic table, group-wise trends, ionization energy, electron affinity, electronegativity, atomic size.

name: Chemical Bonding
description: Electrovalent, covalent, and coordinate bonding, electron dot structures.

name: Acids, Bases & Salts
description: Properties, pH scale, indicators, preparation and classification of salts.

name: Analytical Chemistry
description: Action of ammonium hydroxide and sodium hydroxide on salt solutions.

name: Mole Concept & Stoichiometry
description: Gay Lussac's Law, Avogadro's Law, relative molecular mass, empirical and molecular formula calculations.

name: Electrolysis
description: Electrochemical series, electrolysis of molten lead bromide, acidified water, copper sulfate using active/inert electrodes.

name: Metallurgy
description: Extraction of Aluminium (Hall-Heroult process), alloys, common ores.

name: Study of Compounds: Hydrogen Chloride
description: Laboratory preparation, fountain experiment, properties, and tests for HCl.

name: Study of Compounds: Ammonia
description: Haber's process, laboratory preparation, fountain experiment, properties and uses of NH3.

name: Study of Compounds: Nitric Acid
description: Ostwald's process, laboratory preparation, oxidizing properties of HNO3.

name: Study of Compounds: Sulphuric Acid
description: Contact process, dehydrating agent properties, oxidizing agent properties.

name: Organic Chemistry
description: Alkanes, Alkenes, Alkynes, functional groups (alcohol, aldehyde, carboxylic acid), nomenclature, and preparation.
